- Chemical hardness: 3.72 eV

**Total energy:** −78.623486 Hartree (−2139.45 eV, −49337.0 kcal/mol)

**Integrity:** trustworthy = true; all checks passed (energy finite, SCF converged, schema valid).

**Command:** `frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz --accept-defaults`
